title: Investor Pitch Deck Script
description: Generate a compelling pitch deck narrative for fundraising
prompt:
Create a 10-slide pitch deck script for [company name]. We are a [industry] startup that [one-line description]. Include: Problem, Solution, Market Size (TAM/SAM/SOM), Business Model, Traction, Team, Competition, Go-to-Market, Financials, Ask. Make each slide punchy with one key message. Target audience: [seed/Series A] investors.

Key metrics: [paste metrics]

title: Competitive Analysis Framework
description: Analyze competitors systematically across key dimensions
prompt:
Conduct a competitive analysis for [your product] against these competitors: [competitor 1], [competitor 2], [competitor 3]. Analyze each across: pricing, features, target audience, market positioning, strengths, weaknesses, and unique selling points. Create a comparison matrix and identify gaps we can exploit.

Our product: [description]

title: OKR Generator
description: Create quarterly OKRs aligned with company strategy
prompt:
Generate quarterly OKRs for [team/department]. Company mission: [mission]. This quarter's strategic priority: [priority]. Create 3 Objectives, each with 3-4 measurable Key Results. Each KR should be specific, time-bound, and have a clear metric. Include stretch targets.

Team size: [number]
Current challenges: [challenges]

title: Customer Persona Builder
description: Create detailed customer personas from market data
prompt:
Create 3 detailed customer personas for [product/service]. For each persona include: Name, Age, Job title, Income, Goals, Pain points, Preferred channels, Buying triggers, Objections, and a day-in-the-life scenario. Base these on [industry] market data.

Product: [description]
Target market: [market]

title: Partnership Proposal Writer
description: Draft a compelling business partnership proposal
prompt:
Write a partnership proposal from [your company] to [target company]. Structure: Executive summary, mutual benefits, proposed collaboration model, revenue sharing/terms, timeline, success metrics, and next steps. Tone: professional but enthusiastic. Emphasize the win-win.

Your company: [description]
Target company: [description]
Proposed partnership: [idea]

title: Unit Economics Calculator
description: Break down unit economics for a business model
prompt:
Calculate and explain the unit economics for my [business type]. Given these inputs:
- Customer Acquisition Cost: $[CAC]
- Average Revenue Per User: $[ARPU]/month
- Gross Margin: [X]%
- Monthly Churn: [X]%

Calculate: LTV, LTV:CAC ratio, payback period, and break-even point. Tell me if this business model is healthy and what to improve.

title: Board Meeting Prep
description: Prepare a structured board meeting agenda and talking points
prompt:
Prepare a board meeting agenda and talking points. Company: [name], Stage: [seed/growth/etc]. Cover: financial update, KPI dashboard, product roadmap progress, team updates, risks and mitigation, strategic decisions needed, and Q&A prep. Include potential tough questions and suggested answers.

Key updates this quarter: [updates]

title: Pricing Strategy Advisor
description: Develop a data-driven pricing strategy for your product
prompt: Help me develop a pricing strategy for [product]. Current price: [price]. Competitors charge: [range]. Our costs: [costs]. Analyze these pricing models for my case: freemium, tiered, usage-based, flat-rate, and per-seat. Recommend the best approach with specific price points and justification. Include a pricing page layout suggestion.
